creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
Sorry, I forgot to use SF macro:

--- Makefile.orig	2008-04-11 09:12:51.000000000 +1000
+++ Makefile	2008-04-11 09:13:07.000000000 +1000
@@ -8,8 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=	gnomeicu
 PORTVERSION=	0.99.14
 CATEGORIES=	net-im gnome
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	gnomeicu
+MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
 MAINTAINER=	gnome@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	GNOME 2 ICQ client
